title: lupinus saxosus var. subsericeus
intro: Lupinus saxosus var. subsericeus, also known as the Rocky Mountain lupine, is a variety of the lupine plant, a flowering plant in the legume family native to western North America. The medicinal properties of Lupinus saxosus var. subsericeus include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and act as a natural antiseptic. Lupinus saxosus var. subsericeus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
